3307110.name: Anime Scary Teacher 3D
3307110.description:
A day at school has never been this thrilling! Izumi Sensei, your ruthless teacher with a dark side, has been terrorizing the students for far too long. It’s time to teach her a lesson she’ll never forget—by pranking her at every turn!

Will you outsmart Izumi Sensei, or will her sharp instincts catch you in the act? Your mission: cause as much chaos as possible, and maybe even make her regret all those cruel punishments. After all, revenge is sweet!

Features:

  • Dive into a hilarious 3D anime world full of tricky pranks and surprises!

  • Outsmart and prank the terrifying Izumi Sensei, but beware—she's always watching!

  • Explore different parts of the school and unlock hidden areas for the perfect prank.

  • Laugh, plot, and prank your way through this wild adventure as you teach Izumi Sensei that payback can be fun!
